description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, tactical design. The barrel is short and cylindrical, featuring a large suppressor or muzzle device at the front, giving it a distinctive, silenced appearance. The grip is ergonomically contoured with deep finger grooves, and the trigger guard is rounded and reinforced, providing a secure hold. The receiver area is bulky, with visible mechanical details and a top-mounted sight or rail system for attachments. The overall build is solid and heavy, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The design suggests a weapon intended for close-quarters use, possibly in urban or tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a large suppressor, ergonomic grip, and tactical detailing. Its design is robust and functional, suited for close-quarters urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the large suppressor, ergonomic grip, and top-mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle of the suppressor and the alignment of the sight above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the suppressor and grip details, with mechanical features on the receiver visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the sight, with the suppressor extending forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a large cylindrical suppressor; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with pronounced finger grooves and reinforced edges
